title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!
